general_feedback: Both filled-in @return descriptions are accurate (the methods return `this.type`, i.e., the buffer itself after mutation), start with lowercase, are concise, and follow Scaladoc conventions. They are slightly more descriptive than the surrounding `the buffer itself` / `the $coll itself` style, but that is a reasonable improvement and not a problem. No changes required.
